Name: FCameraLookatTrackingSettings
Description: Settings to control the camera's lookat feature

Variables.Name: bEnableLookAtTracking
Variables.Description:
True to enable lookat tracking, false otherwise. 
	UPROPERTY(Interp, EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "LookAt")

Variables.Name: bDrawDebugLookAtTrackingPosition
Variables.Description: True to draw a debug representation of the lookat location

Variables.Name: LookAtTrackingInterpSpeed
Variables.Description: Controls degree of smoothing. 0.f for no smoothing, higher numbers for fastertighter tracking.

Variables.Name: ActorToTrack
Variables.Description: If set, camera will track this actor's location

Variables.Name: RelativeOffset
Variables.Description: Offset from actor position to look at. Relative to actor if tracking an actor, relative to world otherwise.

Variables.Name: bAllowRoll
Variables.Description: True to allow user-defined roll, false otherwise.
